name: Tee
description: A plugin for secure key derivation and remote attestation within Trusted Execution Environments (TEE).

TEE_MODE.label: Mode
TEE_MODE.help: Determines the Trusted Execution Environment operation mode (LOCAL, DOCKER, PRODUCTION) and is referenced in error handling to validate provided modes.

TEE_VENDOR.label: Vendor
TEE_VENDOR.help: Specifies which Trusted Execution Environment vendor to initialize (defaults to PHALA).

WALLET_SECRET_SALT.label: Secret Salt
WALLET_SECRET_SALT.help: Secret salt used to deterministically derive Solana and EVM keypairs inside the TEE.
